experiences.description: Acquired hands-on experience in MERN stack development, building scalable full-stack applications with efficient frontend–backend integration. Implemented and consumed RESTful APIs with optimized backend logic to improve performance and data flow. Worked on authentication, authorization, and secure database operations, ensuring data integrity and application security.

job_analysis.title: Data Analyst
requirements: Collect, clean, and preprocess structured and unstructured data
Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical analysis
Develop dashboards using Power BI, Tableau, or similar tools
Write optimized SQL queries to extract and analyze data
Generate reports and present findings to stakeholders
Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and compliance

ats_best_practices.feedback: ATS readiness is based on whether the resume exposes the key sections cleanly.

evidence: B.Tech (AI&DS) Artificial Intelligence and Data Science HSC  SSLC  B.Tech (AI&DS) - Sri Eshwar College of Engineering CGPA : 8.6(upto 5th sem)  INTERSHIP

recommendations: Add or strengthen evidence for these JD skills if you have used them: SQL, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Statistics, Probability, Data Analysis.

Address these job requirements more directly in your resume bullets: Strong proficiency in SQL, Understanding of statistics and probability, Strong analytical and communication skills, Collect, clean, and preprocess structured and unstructured data.
Start more bullets with strong action verbs like built, optimized, led, automated, or reduced.
Reorder projects and experience so the most relevant work for this job appears first.
